@@ -68,0 +71,7 @@
+    private static void setupLogging() {
+        final Handler handler = new ConsoleHandler();
+        handler.setLevel(Level.ALL);
+        logger.setLevel(Level.ALL);
+        logger.addHandler(handler);
+    }
